jsonld.name: Temporal Fiction Collapse
jsonld.description: The disorienting moment when the collaborative temporal fiction becomes explicitly acknowledged in conversation, requiring you to navigate dialogue where the pretense of shared temporality has been named as pretense but cannot be fully abandoned without making communication impossible.
